name: Brand Checker
desc: Brand compliance scoring tool for Ideoworks global campaigns. React + Node.js app with scoring engine and CRM leads integration.
bestFor: Validating client brand assets before multi-market campaign launch
needs: Brand name, target market (ID/KO/MS/TH), asset files or URLs to check

name: GamifyLP
desc: Mid-funnel gamified landing builder. Score-based lead routing, voucher/trial offers, IDW attribution. 90+ backlog items across 15 dimensions.
bestFor: Mid-funnel client campaigns that need lead qualification before handoff to sales
needs: Client name, offer type (voucher/trial/demo), target demographic, IDW attribution code

name: Proposal Generator
desc: CASA-framework proposal builder for client pitches — Communicate, Amplify, Socialize, Analyze. Structured output for Ideoworks decks.
bestFor: First-meeting proposals and RFP responses for new client pitches
needs: Client name, industry/category, campaign objective, budget range, which CASA pillar to lead

name: Report Generator
desc: Client advertising performance report builder. Wink Dec 2025 format as baseline. Standard Ideoworks monthly reporting tool.
bestFor: Monthly client performance reports across Meta, Google, or TikTok campaigns
needs: Client name, reporting period, platform, and key metrics (spend, impressions, clicks, conversions, ROAS)

name: Campaign Budget Planner
desc: HTML tool for Meta Ads campaign budget planning. Built for Ideoworks client planning and media allocation sessions.
bestFor: Client budget allocation meetings — splitting spend across placements, markets, and objectives
needs: Total campaign budget, flight dates, target markets, objectives (awareness vs. conversion ratio)

name: Authority Strategy
desc: Ideoworks brand authority and thought leadership positioning framework. Content strategy and platform presence plan.
bestFor: Pitching Ideoworks as the strategic partner, not just an execution vendor
needs: Prospect's industry, their current pain point, and which CASA pillar to open with

name: Growth Team AI One-Pager
desc: Value-add/retention/new-client one-pager for CEO Arianto Bigman. AI tool statuses and framing for Growth Division pitch.
bestFor: Internal leadership updates on AI tool rollout status and Growth Division positioning
needs: No customization — present as-is in CEO or leadership meetings

name: Growth Team Shareholder Deck
desc: BCG-style shareholder presentation for Ideoworks Growth Division. HTML version of the stakeholder-facing deck.
bestFor: Board-level or shareholder presentations on Growth Division performance and direction
needs: Current quarter results and which initiative to spotlight in the deck

name: IDW Action Plan Rationalization
desc: Ideoworks strategic action plan rationalization document. Resource allocation and initiative prioritization framework.
bestFor: Quarterly planning when you need to cut or reprioritize initiatives due to resource constraints
needs: List of active projects, current team capacity per division, and top 2–3 strategic priorities

name: Social Strategy 2026
desc: Platform-specific social media strategy for Ideoworks brand channels. Content calendar, tone, and channel execution plan.
bestFor: Briefing the content team on Ideoworks' own channel strategy and platform tone
needs: Current quarter campaign focus and any upcoming brand moments to align content around

name: Global Landing Mockup
desc: Ideoworks global landing page mockup. Multi-market prototype for ID/KO/MS/TH markets. Campaign funnel entry point design.
bestFor: Showing clients a working prototype of their multi-market campaign landing page before dev build
needs: Client name, primary markets, and the main offer or CTA to feature

name: Campaign System Blueprint
desc: Global campaign system architecture. Meta Ads + CRM integration blueprint for Ideoworks multi-market campaigns.
bestFor: Client-facing architecture presentation to explain how Meta Ads and CRM connect end-to-end
needs: Client's CRM tool, active markets, and campaign phase (awareness/lead gen/retargeting)

name: Meta CRM Playbook
desc: Meta Ads + CRM integration playbook. Lead flow, retargeting logic, and pipeline management for Ideoworks global campaign.
bestFor: Onboarding AM teams on lead flow logic and retargeting setup for global campaigns
needs: Which CRM the client uses, lead qualification criteria, and retargeting window agreed with client

name: Meta Ads — Indonesia (ID)
desc: Full creative set for Indonesia market: reel A/B/C, carousel A, static awareness + retargeting.
bestFor: Reference when briefing the creative team or presenting campaign concepts to Indonesian market clients
needs: Campaign phase (awareness/retargeting) and the product or service being advertised

name: Meta Ads — Korea (KO)
desc: Full creative set for Korea market: reel A/B/C, carousel A, static awareness + retargeting.
bestFor: Reference when briefing creative or presenting to Korean market clients
needs: Campaign phase and product being advertised in the Korean market

name: Meta Ads — Malaysia (MS)
desc: Full creative set for Malaysia market: reel A/B/C, carousel A, static awareness + retargeting.
bestFor: Reference when briefing creative or presenting to Malaysian market clients
needs: Campaign phase and product being advertised in the Malaysian market

name: Meta Ads — Thailand (TH)
desc: Full creative set for Thailand market: reel A/B/C, carousel A, static awareness + retargeting.
bestFor: Reference when briefing creative or presenting to Thai market clients
needs: Campaign phase and product being advertised in the Thai market

name: CRM Panduan AM
desc: Account Manager guide for Ideoworks CRM in Google Sheets. SOP for leads, accounts, deals pipeline management.
bestFor: Onboarding new AMs or refreshing the team on CRM pipeline discipline
needs: No customization — send the link directly or walk through it in a team session

name: LinkedIn Pitch Scanner
desc: Dashboard for tracking LinkedIn pitch performance. Python scanner + Google Apps Script backend for Ideoworks BD outreach.
bestFor: Tracking and optimizing BD outreach performance on LinkedIn week-over-week
needs: LinkedIn account access, Google Sheets CRM connected, and an active prospect list to scan

name: Campaign System (Lean)
desc: Simplified version of the global campaign system architecture. Lean execution framework for Ideoworks multi-market rollout.
bestFor: Quick campaign setup when you don't have time for full system architecture — sprint execution
needs: Campaign objective, available channels, and team headcount for the sprint

name: CRM Web View
desc: HTML web view of the Ideoworks CRM. Visual pipeline and leads dashboard for quick reference outside Google Sheets.
bestFor: Quick pipeline snapshot during meetings without opening Google Sheets
needs: No setup — data reflects the last CRM export; refresh the sheet to update
